name: san-lorenzo-wwsys
description: San Lorenzo Water Billing System - Monorepo

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix web-app" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "red,blue" --kill-others-on-fail
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix web-app" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "red,blue" --kill-others-on-fail
